# Engram

> Persistent long-term memory for AI agents. Temporal knowledge graphs, ACT-R cognitive architecture for activation-aware retrieval, and 12-phase offline consolidation inspired by biological memory. Open source, privacy-first, runs locally.

Engram gives AI agents a brain that persists across sessions. Instead of losing context when a conversation ends, Engram builds a knowledge graph of entities, relationships, and facts extracted from conversations — then retrieves them using spreading activation when relevant.

## Key Capabilities

- **Dual mode**: SQLite (lite, zero infrastructure) or FalkorDB + Redis (full, production-ready)
- **CQRS ingestion**: `observe` (fast, no LLM) vs `remember` (full extraction + entity resolution)
- **ACT-R activation**: Recency/frequency ranking computed lazily from access history
- **12-phase consolidation**: triage, merge, infer, replay, prune, compact, mature, semanticize, schema, reindex, graph_embed, dream
- **Memory maturation**: Entities graduate episodic → transitional → semantic with differential decay
- **MCP server**: 15 tools via stdio transport for any MCP-compatible agent
- **Privacy-first**: Memory storage is local. No centralized data collection.

## Install

```
curl -sSL https://engram.run/install | bash
```

Or manually: `git clone https://github.com/Moshik21/engram.git && cd engram/server && uv sync && uv run engram setup`

## CLI

- `engram setup` — Interactive setup wizard
- `engram serve` — Start REST API at localhost:8100
- `engram mcp` — Start MCP server (stdio transport)
- `engram health` — Check if server is running
- `engram config` — Edit settings

## Integration

- [MCP Server](https://engram.run/docs): `engram mcp` — recommended for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf
- [REST API](https://engram.run/docs): `engram serve` — HTTP server at port 8100 with OpenAPI docs
- [OpenClaw Skill](https://github.com/Moshik21/engram/tree/main/skills/engram-memory): ClawHub skill for persistent agent memory
- [Docker Full Stack](https://engram.run/docs): `docker compose up -d --build` for FalkorDB + Redis + dashboard

## MCP Tools (15)

Capture: observe, remember, forget, bootstrap_project
Retrieval: recall, search_entities, search_facts, get_context
Management: mark_identity_core, intend, dismiss_intention, list_intentions
System: get_consolidation_status, trigger_consolidation, get_graph_state
